name: app_settings
title: App Settings
description: Server-wide, admin-managed configuration for app packages: one key/value per row, keys namespaced by app (payments.overpayment_policy). The settings sibling of user_prefs (per-user) and feature_flags (on/off switches); operator/infra config stays in env. Hooks and the daemon read these with code-side defaults, so an absent row always means the documented default.
